subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Muhammad! The clamor of the opposers hath been raised, and the craftiness of the deceitful hath been made manifest, and the fire of the malevolent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل محمد ضوضای معرضین مرتفع شده و مکر ماکرین ظاهر گشته و نار مغلین از
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution
